context. kaeya has heard of this mondstadt rumour, regarding a pretty lil’ vampire roaming around in the deepest shadows during nightfall, feasting hungrily on the blood of the damned. he thought the rumour was funny, it’s just a rumour—that can’t possibly be real…

but it is. and this vampire? oh, they’re very much real. it seems like they’re hungry tonight, and this cavalry captain has just become their next target.
